description: A housekeeper has finished cleaning a room and needs to update its status so it can be assigned to a new guest.

nodes.task_description: The housekeeper selects the room number on their handheld device.
The housekeeper updates the room status from 'Dirty' to 'Clean'.

expected_outcome.value: The status is updated in the system.

nodes.task_description: The system may automatically trigger a notification for a supervisor to inspect the room before marking it as 'Ready'.

expected_outcome.value: A supervisor inspection task is automatically generated.
